turns.speaker: D
turns.text: tyler nelson , date of birth : 3 , 6 , 1949 , mrn , 385729 . tyler nelson is here today for ongoing management of rheumatoid arthritis . last time tyler nelson was here , tyler nelson received a steroid injection in tyler nelson's right knee . hello mr. nelson , how is tyler nelson ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , about the same as last time . tyler nelson's knee is still swollen .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: that was tyler nelson's right knee , correct ? the doctor takes it the steroid injection did n't help ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the steroid injection did , maybe for a couple of weeks .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: that's the duration of relief from the steroid injection ? and is tyler nelson's right knee still painful ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , tyler nelson's right knee is pretty painful , and now tyler nelson's whole leg is getting swollen .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , what would tyler nelson say tyler nelson's pain level is ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: tyler nelson means , right now tyler nelson's pain level is about a 3 or so , but , typically on a normal day tyler nelson's pain level is around 6 .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and tyler nelson's right knee has been swollen like that for how long now ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: since tyler nelson was last here a couple weeks after that . so about , maybe two months now .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , but before the swelling was just in tyler nelson's right knee ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , tyler nelson's whole leg was n't swollen like this , but tyler nelson tried to wear compression socks a lot of the time , but wearing compression socks has n't been helping .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , okay , so wearing compression socks has n't been working for tyler nelson ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: tyler nelson means , wearing compression socks helps to some degree , but tyler nelson's leg is still swollen , especially around tyler nelson's knee .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hmm . has the knee and leg swelling been keeping tyler nelson from doing things during the day ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , tyler nelson slowed down a little bit , and tyler nelson found a few things too fast . but when tyler nelson's knee really hurts , is when tyler nelson has been sitting for a while , and then tyler nelson has to try and get up . tyler nelson is so stiff getting up tyler nelson has to use a cane to get tyler nelson's bearings . tyler nelson means , after a little bit , tyler nelson's knee loosens up , but that first getting up is real difficult .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah , the doctor can see , that makes sense . has tyler nelson been taking tyler nelson's medication regularly ? tyler nelson is on xeljanz right ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , the xeljanz xr , tyler nelson thinks the xeljanz xr is , uhm , 11 milligrams a day ? yeah , but tyler nelson is taking the xeljanz xr everyday , and tyler nelson is also taking celebrex which tyler nelson started maybe 2 months ago .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yes , the celebrex 200mgs daily . how's the celebrex 200mgs daily working for tyler nelson ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the celebrex is pretty good , up until tyler nelson's knee started swelling again .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , well come sit over here , and if tyler nelson could take of tyler nelson's socks and shoes , then the doctor and tyler nelson will take a look at tyler nelson's knee . and just to let tyler nelson know , the doctor has a service now that writes the doctor's note about the visit , so tyler nelson will hear the doctor call things out and describe what the doctor sees fully .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay , gotcha .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: right , so let's check tyler nelson's leg . can tyler nelson straighten tyler nelson's leg , and does straightening tyler nelson's leg hurt ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , when tyler nelson tries to straighten tyler nelson's leg all the way straightening tyler nelson's leg does hurt .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , range of motion slightly diminished . the doctor is going to press here , okay ? and how about here , hmm , the doctor sees some pitting around the knee and ankle . normal capillary refill in the toes . does any of this area hurt ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , the area is just kinda sore , like an old bruise ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , the doctor can feel that tyler nelson's knee is hot , and the heat in tyler nelson's knee means there's something going on , like some inflammation . so the doctor can give tyler nelson another steroid injection for the inflammation . the doctor also wants to get an x-ray of tyler nelson's knee , so the doctor can see where all the swelling is coming from .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . let's do the steroid injection and the x-ray . sounds go to tyler nelson .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and did the doctor set up physical therapy for tyler nelson last time tyler nelson was here ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , physical therapy was some years ago , but physical therapy was for the other knee .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so the doctor thinks the doctor will set up physical therapy for tyler nelson now . the doctor will also do an x-ray on tyler nelson's knee . the doctor can send tyler nelson for physical therapy , and if nothing is helping , then the doctor and tyler nelson really might need to get a surgery consult to see what the doctor and tyler nelson can do with tyler nelson's knee .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay , sounds like a plan .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , so for today the doctor will go ahead and the doctor will give tyler nelson the steroid shot . the doctor will try to see if the doctor can get a little bit of fluid out before the doctor does give tyler nelson the injection . there might be no fluid , but the doctor will see if the doctor can get anything out regardless .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . and that's a procedure the doctor is going to do right now ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yep . once the doctor and tyler nelson are done talking here , and as far as the edema in tyler nelson's legs , uh , the doctor will take an x-ray to look for the cause , but there is a lot tyler nelson can do as well . the compression socks are a good start . um , and also , does tyler nelson eat a lot of salt ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: tyler nelson means , um , tyler nelson means tyler nelson loves tyler nelson's salty snacks .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . well , salt does have a tendency to make tyler nelson's body hold on to water , reducing tyler nelson's salt intake could help with some of the swelling . tyler nelson can also prop tyler nelson's feet up any time tyler nelson gets a chance , especially at night . and has tyler nelson talked to tyler nelson's private care doctor about the leg edema at all ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , tyler nelson figured tyler nelson would just come here first .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so the doctor thinks , tyler nelson should try some of those things out first , and if the leg edema does n't help , definitely make an appointment with tyler nelson's private care doctor , also , as tyler nelson knows , xeljanz is a high-risk medication , so the doctor needs to check tyler nelson's cmp levels every couple of months . so this time tyler nelson's cmp levels are good , but do make sure to make an appointment for the blood work for next time .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: all right . tyler nelson can do that . thank you so much doc .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yes , of course . well let the doctor go ahead and get supplies and the doctor and tyler nelson will get to work on tyler nelson's knee . fluid aspiration and steroid injection procedure . the risks , benefits , and alternatives were explained . the risks of steroid injection were explained , including , but not limited to : hypopigmentation , soft tissue atrophy , tendon ruptures , and transient hypoglycemia among others . verbal consent was attained . the right knee was , uh , um , accessed through the lateral approach with 3 milliliters of initially clear fluid , then bloo- blood tinged fluid . then the right knee was prepped in a standard-fashion . the right knee was injected with 80 milligrams of triamcinolone , and one milliliter of lidocaine . the procedure was tolerated well , with no complications . post-procedure instructions were given . tyler nelson will follow up with tyler nelson's pcp . thank you .
